Item Name: Chocolate Orchard Dark Chocolate Covered Cashews – Premium Dark Chocolate, Cashew Treat, Indulgent Snack, No Trans Fat – 6oz Bag
Product Description: Nutty, fresh, and chocolatey – need we say more? Treat yourself to the decadence of milky cashews lathered in a silky smooth dark chocolate coating with these blissful bites from Chocolate Orchard. Here at Chocolate Orchard, we’re all about purposeful indulgence. This means treating yourself to something a little naughty every now and again and savoring every minute of it. What better way to indulge than with a cheat snack that’s loaded with nutrients and benefits, while still scratching that naughty itch? Chocolate Orchard Dark Chocolate Covered Cashews are as decadent and smooth as they are sinfully nutritious. Cashews are a nut that is low in sugar and rich in fiber, helping you regulate blood sugar and keep your hunger at bay for longer. They are also loaded with heart-healthy fats and plant protein, which support you in rest and recovery. Cashews are loaded with copper, magnesium, and manganese – nutrients that are all essential for brain health, your immune system, and energy production. Inside the bag you’ll find only honest ingredients, including 56% rich cacao to bring antioxidant benefits known to help protect your body from disease – guaranteed to allow you to drift off into chocolate heaven in no time, with the first few blissful bites of this 6oz (170g) bag. Who knew that something so naughty could be so nice? Grab a bag of our Chocolate Orchard Dark Chocolate Covered Cashews and treat yourself… you deserve it!

Item Name: Terra Chips Chip Swts & Beets
Bullet Point 1: 100% Natural + No trans fats + Parve Kosher + Krinkle Cut Vegetable Chips.
Bullet Point 2: TERRA Chips are cooked only in expeller pressed oils
Bullet Point 3: Rich color + Bold luscious flavor = Gourmet snacks.
Bullet Point 4: A hearty crunch that will create a memorable gourmet experience.
Bullet Point 5: Healthier Products. Healthier Environment. Healthier Packaging. Healthier Communities
Product Description: TERRA Sweets & Beets Chips TERRA Sweet Potato Chips have always been one of the favorites of our TERRA Exotic Vegetable Chips. Now, this popular flavor is complimented by another sweet vegetable - naturally vibrant beets. The rich color of the beet chips' crimson hut is matched by its bold luscious flavor. These TERRA Sweets & Beets Chips offer a hearty crunch that will create a memorable gourmet experience. Over 20 Years of Deliciousness TERRA Chips were the brainchild of two New York chefs with the sort of entrepreneurial spirit that keeps one's ingenuity and imagination cooking. Dana Sinkler and Alex Dzieduszycki each left their jobs at four-star Manhattan restaurants to begin a modest catering business that would soon grow to cater some of the most elite parties in the Big Apple. Since main dishes must be tailored to each event, they knew a signature entree would not suffice for every occasion. The focus turned to the bar, where guests characteristically made their first visit to order a drink and nibble on appetizers. The two chefs went to work creating a versatile dish that could be enjoyed as a flavorful snack at the bar, a beautiful and delicious accompaniment to any meal or a welcomed addition to the fanciful plate of hors d'oeuvres. In February of 1990, within Dana's tiny apartment kitchen, TERRA Chips were born.
Value: 12.0
Unit: ounce
overall_summary: Gourmet vegetable chips positioned as a premium snack with bold flavors and natural ingredients. Marketing emphasizes gourmet experience, health-conscious attributes, and sustainable practices. Pricing likely reflects premium positioning, artisanal branding, and gourmet quality.
